long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between bcs261b.sr01.dal12 Et49/1 <-> bas24a.sr01.dal12 Et18/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19721
short_description: bcs261b.sr01.dal12 Et49/1 <-> bas24a.sr01.dal12 Et18/1 | Link Errors
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
